subcodes.first_line: Thy petition was presented before the Most Great Presence, and the eye of loving-kindness was directed towards it. Be thou not saddened by separation and remoteness, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات در معرض اکبر حاضر و عین مرحمت باو متوجه از بعد و فراق محزون مباش چه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
